title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Acne
description: Aloe barbadensis tinctures contains aloin and aloe-emodin, two potent anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce redness and swelling associated with acne. Aloe-emodin also has antimicrobial properties, which inhibit the growth of bacteria that can cause acne, such as Propionibacterium acnes. Aloin and aloe-emodin also have a soothing effect on the skin, reducing irritation and promoting healing. The tannins and flavonoids in aloe barbadensis tinctures have astringent properties, whi...
